top_strength: Flawless pricing and differentiators — hit all 10 bullets including damage coverage, Meet Your Mover, On-Time Guarantee, and complete no-hidden-fees pitch.
coaching_note: Strong call overall but booking close needs work — add 'reply with corrections,' final questions invite, and contact hours.
phone_presence_notes: Arden was consistently respectful and used 'ma'am' throughout, but never used the customer's first name — warmth was formal rather than personal.
